ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city or community */,
  "population_2018" INTEGER /* Total population as of 2018 */,
  "population_2023" INTEGER /* Total population as of 2023 */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the city's health department */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the city's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the metric applies to */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease the metric applies to */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported */,
  "crude_case_rate" REAL /* Crude case rate per 100,000 population */,
  "adjusted_case_rate" REAL /* Adjusted case rate per 100,000 population */,
  "unstable_adjusted_rate" TEXT /* Unstable adjusted rate (if applicable) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the health metrics were recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the health metrics were recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the metrics */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the health metrics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Transmission mode of the disease */,
  "preventive_measures" TEXT /* Preventive measures for the disease */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the disease information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiologists" (
  "epidemiologist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epidemiologist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the epidemiologist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the epidemiologist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the epidemiologist */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the epidemiologist */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the epidemiologist belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the epidemiologist's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epidemiologist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the report is about */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease the report is about */,
  "epidemiologist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the epidemiologist who prepared the report */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was prepared */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_epidemiologist_id FOREIGN KEY ("epidemiologist_id") REFERENCES epidemiologists ("epidemiologist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the intervention is taking place */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease the intervention is targeting */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the intervention (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the intervention information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the demographic data applies to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count within the demographic group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the demographic data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the demographic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the factor applies to */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental factor */,
  "measurement" REAL /* Measurement or value of the environmental factor */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the environmental factor data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the environmental factor data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the environmental factor data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic indicator */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the indicator applies to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the socioeconomic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the socioeconomic indicator data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the socioeconomic indicator data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the socioeconomic indicator data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_indicators_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data source information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source being accessed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access event was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, administrator) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
